# Wordlist Notices

## NYIST-OS/WordList (MIT License)
Source: https://github.com/NYIST-OS/WordList

Included datasets:
- CET-4 list: `entry/src/main/resources/rawfile/wordbooks/cet4.txt`
- CET-6 list: `entry/src/main/resources/rawfile/wordbooks/cet6.txt`
- 考研英语高频词汇（V1 兜底列表，基于 CET-6 词表精选）: `entry/src/main/resources/rawfile/wordbooks/kaoyan.txt`
